markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review a new product vision and define the path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Vision:** Replace the unusable dashboard with a shareable, programmatic "AI Audit" report, validated by a successful manual prototype for Eon.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**Core Strategy:** Build a V2 front-end prototype for one brand first. This validates the end-to-end user experience before committing to backend automation.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** The audit will evolve into three distinct outputs: a public lead-gen tool, a paid deep-dive report, and a redesigned dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** Marcel will sync with Daniel, then Estevão, to finalize the plan for the V2 prototype.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)

## Topics

### Problem: The Current Dashboard Is Unusable

  - [The current dashboard, while a strong SEO asset, fails to provide user value.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Its raw data is incomprehensible without manual analysis, forcing users to export data for external processing (e.g., with an agent and MCP).](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** The dashboard requires a fundamental redesign, not minor tweaks.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### Solution: The "AI Audit" Report

  - [A manual audit for Eon (a $1B+ data recovery company) proved the concept.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [Eon has near-zero AI visibility despite being a Gartner-recognized vendor.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [The audit cost was \~**$50** in API credits, demonstrating a viable cost structure.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [**Report Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [**Competitive Intel:** Landscape analysis and analyst perception scores.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**SEO Performance:** Audit of technicals, keywords, and traffic sources.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Content Efficiency:** Benchmarks against competitors for traffic/page.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Visibility & Category Mapping:** Analysis of AI perception and market position.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### Implementation: Phased Rollout Plan

  - [The audit will evolve into three distinct outputs:](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
    1.  [**Public Lead-Gen Tool:** A shareable, high-level report (e.g., like Amplitude's AI Visibility tool).](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
    2.  [**Paid Deep-Dive Report:** The full, detailed audit for paying customers.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
    3.  [**Redesigned Dashboard:** A future evolution of the current dashboard, built on the audit's insights.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Sync with Daniel to validate the V2 prototype strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Marcel & Estevão:** Connect to begin sketching and mocking up the V2 prototype.](https://fathom.video/share/K-SenfV8SG1xsuW92SKxt-ssozXesjN6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
